---
title: "CV"
description: "Curriculum vitae of Michael P. Kerr — coursework, teaching, and research in applied mathematics and geography at UGA."
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<script>
document.body.classList.add('cv-page');
// Measure navbar and footer once so the layout stays fixed when the hamburger menu opens
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
  var navH = document.getElementById('quarto-header').offsetHeight;
  var footH = document.querySelector('footer.footer').offsetHeight;
  document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--cv-nav-height', navH + 'px');
  document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--cv-footer-height', footH + 'px');
});
</script>
<div class="container" style="padding-top: 1em;">
  <div class="card" style="overflow: hidden;">
    <div class="card-header d-flex justify-content-end gap-2">
      <a href="cv.pdf" target="_blank" class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm" title="Open in New Tab">
        <i class="bi bi-box-arrow-up-right"></i> Open in New Tab
      </a>
      <a href="cv.pdf" download class="btn btn-primary btn-sm" title="Download CV">
        <i class="bi bi-download"></i> Download
      </a>
    </div>
    <div class="card-body p-0">
      <iframe src="cv.pdf" style="width: 100%; height: 100%; border: 0 !important; display: block; margin: 0; padding: 0;" title="Michael Kerr CV"></iframe>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```
